name: Stephanie Kifowit
bio: Stephanie Kifowit is an Illinois State Representative from Oswego (IL House District 84, Aurora/Fox Valley area), a U.S. Marine Corps veteran, and a former registered financial advisor. She's running for Illinois Comptroller arguing she has the deepest relevant experience in the race — 20 years in Springfield dealing with government finance, plus professional financial advisory credentials. She knows the Comptroller's office staff and the $53M modernization act already in place. A military veteran and fiscal pragmatist, she positions herself as the most technically qualified candidate.
prior_office: Illinois State Representative, 84th District (Oswego/Aurora area); former registered financial advisor; U.S. Marine Corps veteran

jacket.note: Fundraising totals not publicly confirmed. Positioned as third in the money race behind Croke and Villa.

key_votes.summary: Kifowit highlights her familiarity with the $53M modernization act for the Comptroller's office and her relationships with the office's staff — arguing she can lead the office from day one without a learning curve.
